_comment: Seed components for the Economy section's inventory-driven metrics.
Today this drives the 'Energy Prices' card (Ofgem default tariff cap).
The collection is named generically so future Economy inputs (petrol
pump prices, council tax index, etc.) can be added as additional rows
Each row is upserted by `itemId` into the `economy_components`
MongoDB collection. The economy fetcher reads this collection on every
refresh; if it's empty/unreachable the fetcher falls back to the
- update the JSON file and re-run `scripts/seed_economy_components.py`
(or, in future, approve a news-watcher proposal in the admin queue).
- The next cron pass recomputes the metric.
Ofgem cap cadence: quarterly, announced ~6 weeks before each effective

components.name: Ofgem default tariff cap (typical household, dual-fuel, Direct Debit)
components.notes: Annual bill for a typical UK household on a default tariff, paying by Direct Debit. Latest period reduced 7% (-£117) vs Jan-Mar 2026; 11% (-£208) lower than Apr-Jun 2025. Includes 5% VAT. Update each quarter when Ofgem announces the next cap (typically published ~6 weeks before quarter start).
